subject: fix(ux): fix freeformText empty state detection
body:
freeformText stores arrays of block objects per cell, not single objects.
isCanvasEmpty was checking ft?.content which is always falsy for arrays.
Now correctly iterates blocks: Array.isArray(blocks) && blocks.some(...).

Tags: ui, state, empty-state
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-improvements
